heading: Overview
body:
Each Atlas endpoint is associated with an *endpoint set* (a
collection of endpoints that share the same rate limits) and *scope*
(resource scopes organization, project, user, or IP address) that
define its rate limits. The limits for the endpoints vary as only
endpoints within the same endpoint set and scope are rate limited
using the same token bucket. Therefore, Atlas doesn't apply
a uniform API (Application Programming Interface) limit across all the API (Application Programming Interface) requests made by an
Atlas organization or project.
